headline: Chubb (CB) Appoints James Wixtead Chair And Michael O'Donnell President At Tempest Re
summary: Chubb has announced leadership changes at its global reinsurance arm, Chubb Tempest Re. James Wixtead has been appointed Executive Chairman of Chubb Tempest Re. Michael O'Donnell has been named President of Chubb Tempest Re. These leadership changes come as Chubb, traded on the NYSE under ticker NYSE:CB, continues to be closely watched by investors following a multi year share price move, with the stock at $352.53. Over the past 3 years, the stock is up 83.0%, and over 5 years it is up...
